title: Refactor route handlers to idiomatic Effect — extract shared services, eliminate imperative wrappers
summary: Extract 133 Effect.tryPromise wrappers across 13 route files into idiomatic Effect services (TrackerClients, IssueLifecycle, AgentSpawner, WorkspaceService). Replace imperative lib modules, update CLI callers, add comprehensive test suite.

items.title: Define typed error types for all services
items.description: Create src/dashboard/server/services/typed-errors.ts with Data.TaggedError types: TrackerNotConfigured, IssueNotFound, RateLimited, WorkspaceNotFound, AgentAlreadyRunning, BeadsNotInitialized, PlanEmpty. These are shared across all new services and route error handlers.
acceptance_criteria: All 7 error types defined as Data.TaggedError with appropriate fields
Each error type has a descriptive _tag for Effect.catchTag matching
Exports are clean — one import path for all error types
TypeScript compiles without errors

items.title: Extract LinearClient Effect service + tests
items.description: Create LinearClient service using ServiceMap.Service pattern. Methods: getIssue, updateState, getTeamStates, addComment. Extracts ~25 inline fetch() calls to Linear GraphQL from issues.ts, agents.ts, mission-control.ts, misc.ts. Includes API key management, retry on 429, typed errors.
acceptance_criteria: LinearClient service with getIssue, updateState, getTeamStates, addComment methods
Uses ServiceMap.Service + Layer.effect pattern matching EventStoreService
Typed errors: TrackerNotConfigured (no API key), IssueNotFound, RateLimited
Built-in retry on 429 with backoff
Unit tests: 7+ cases covering happy path, missing key, not found, rate limit
No inline Linear GraphQL fetch() calls remain in route files after adoption

items.title: Extract GitHubClient Effect service + tests
items.description: Create GitHubClient service. Methods: getIssue, addLabel, removeLabel, createComment, closeIssue. Extracts GitHub REST API calls from issues.ts, specialists.ts, agents.ts. Rate limit header tracking.
acceptance_criteria: GitHubClient service with getIssue, addLabel, removeLabel, createComment, closeIssue methods
Uses ServiceMap.Service + Layer.effect pattern
Typed errors: TrackerNotConfigured, IssueNotFound, RateLimited
Rate limit headers tracked and respected
addLabel creates label if missing, removeLabel handles already-missing gracefully
Unit tests: 6+ cases covering CRUD, 404, rate limits

items.title: Extract RallyClient Effect service + tests
items.description: Create RallyClient service. Methods: getIssue, updateState. Maps canonical statuses to Rally state values. Extracts Rally WSAPI calls from issues.ts.
acceptance_criteria: RallyClient service with getIssue, updateState methods
Uses ServiceMap.Service + Layer.effect pattern
Maps canonical status names to Rally-specific state values
Typed errors: TrackerNotConfigured, IssueNotFound
Unit tests: 3+ cases covering fetch, missing key, state mapping

items.title: Extract IssueLifecycle Effect service + tests
items.description: Create IssueLifecycle service that unifies 'move issue to status X + patch cache + emit event' pattern duplicated across 9+ endpoints. Methods: transitionTo, addLabel, removeLabel, close. Depends on tracker clients, EventStoreService, and issue-data-service cache.
acceptance_criteria: IssueLifecycle service with transitionTo, addLabel, removeLabel, close methods
transitionTo handles Linear (GraphQL mutation), GitHub (label swap), Rally (WSAPI) paths
transitionTo patches issue-data-service cache + emits domain event
transitionTo no-ops when already in target state
close removes planning/in-review labels, emits issue.closed event
addLabel and removeLabel are idempotent
Unit tests: 10+ cases covering all tracker paths, idempotency, cache patching, events

items.title: Extract WorkspaceService Effect service + tests
items.description: Create WorkspaceService to replace src/lib/workspace-manager.ts (1030L). Methods: create, clean, containerize. Handles git worktree creation, project workspace_command, Docker containers.
acceptance_criteria: WorkspaceService with create, clean, containerize methods
create makes git worktree, runs workspace_command, optionally starts Docker
create is idempotent (no error if workspace exists)
clean preview mode returns list without deleting, clean removes artifacts but preserves .planning
containerize creates docker-compose.yml and starts containers
Replaces all exports from src/lib/workspace-manager.ts
Unit tests: 7+ cases covering create, clean preview/execute, containerize, idempotency

items.title: Extract AgentSpawner Effect service + tests
items.description: Create AgentSpawner to replace src/lib/agents.ts (1222L). Methods: startWork, startPlanning, kill, deepWipe. Depends on IssueLifecycle and WorkspaceService.
acceptance_criteria: AgentSpawner with startWork, startPlanning, kill, deepWipe methods
startWork: creates workspace if missing, checks beads init, creates tmux session, writes agent state, transitions issue
startPlanning: creates .planning dir, writes PLANNING_PROMPT.md, sets tmux options
kill: SIGTERM + cleanup, preserves workspace
deepWipe: requires explicit confirmation param, removes workspace/branches/state
Replaces all exports from src/lib/agents.ts
Unit tests: 13+ cases covering start, planning, kill, deepWipe, beads/plan validation

items.title: Refactor major route files to use Effect services
items.description: Refactor the 6 largest route files (agents.ts 1741L, issues.ts 2230L, specialists.ts 2193L, workspaces.ts 3711L, mission-control.ts 1222L, misc.ts 1702L) to use the new Effect services instead of inline imperative code. Replace Effect.tryPromise wrappers with Effect.gen + service calls + typed error handling.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 route files refactored to use new services
Zero Effect.tryPromise wrappers remaining in these files
Zero inline fetch() calls remaining
All error handling uses Effect.catchTag with typed errors
postMergeLifecycle idempotency guards preserved in specialists.ts (PAN-328)
Deep-wipe confirmation parameter requirement preserved
Route files reduced from ~12,800 lines total to ~4,000
TypeScript strict mode passes

items.title: Refactor minor route files + wire service layers in server.ts
items.description: Refactor remaining 7 route files (settings, remote, costs, metrics, resources, conversations, cloister) and update server.ts to compose all new service layers.
acceptance_criteria: All 7 minor route files refactored — zero Effect.tryPromise wrappers
server.ts composes all new service layers (LinearClientLive, GitHubClientLive, etc.)
Layer dependency graph correctly wired
TypeScript strict mode passes
Server starts and responds to health check

items.title: Update CLI callers to use Effect services
items.description: Update ~15 CLI command files that import from src/lib/agents.ts and src/lib/workspace-manager.ts to use the new Effect services with runPromise/runSync. Remove or deprecate old lib modules.
acceptance_criteria: All 12 CLI files importing lib/agents.ts updated to use AgentSpawner service
All 3 CLI files importing lib/workspace-manager.ts updated to use WorkspaceService
agent-enrichment-service.ts updated to use AgentSpawner
Old lib/agents.ts and lib/workspace-manager.ts removed or reduced to re-exports
CLI commands still work (manual smoke test)
TypeScript strict mode passes

items.title: Integration tests + error channel tests
items.description: Write integration tests verifying route→service→Effect chains and error channel tests ensuring consistent JSON error responses across all error types.
acceptance_criteria: Integration tests for issue routes (6 cases: start-planning, complete-planning, abort, reset, cancel, move-status)
Integration tests for agent routes (5 cases: start, start-reject-no-beads, start-reject-no-plan, kill, deep-wipe)
Integration tests for specialist routes (4 cases: review-done, test-done, merge-done, idempotency guard)
Error channel tests (8 cases: one per error type → correct HTTP status + JSON shape)
All tests pass with `npm test`

items.title: Final quality gates — typecheck, lint, full test suite
items.description: Run all quality gates, fix any remaining issues, ensure clean build.
acceptance_criteria: npm run typecheck passes
npm run lint passes
npm test passes (all existing + new tests)
npm run build succeeds
No regressions in existing functionality
